content:
Done. Committed and pushed to the existing vibe branch.

**Commit SHA:** `3da2fa98`

**Summary:** Changed the logged-out homepage welcome message in `src/app/(frontend)/page.tsx` from `"Welcome to your new project."` to `"Welcome from kody — verify run 1778760822574"` per issue #3419 requirements. The draft PR #3420 will update and Vercel will redeploy the same preview URL.
